title: Project Miner Temp Power Customer Completion Baseline Live Admission
authority_basis: Jason's 2026-05-18 standing PM blocker authority as repo technical authority and project stakeholder.
objective: Clear the post-production-tracking customer reporting and completion evidence blocker by admitting one insert-only zero-report and zero-evidence Temp Power customer completion baseline record, without opening customer-facing delivery, customer commitments, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance outputs.
preconditions: PM Lane 277 approval row reads back as approved_for_import_packet.
PM Lane 278 import reads back as imported with current_candidate_match=true and counts_match=true.
PM Lane 279 field authorization and assignment reads back as 184 assignments for 184 unique imported apparatus rows.
PM Lane 280 schedule/status readiness reads back as 15 ready tasks, 184 ready apparatus, 7 not_started workpackages, 184 assignments, and 0 issues.
PM Lane 281 durable field record reads back as durable_field_recorded with record_count=1 and production_quantity_count=0.

PM Lane 282 production tracking reads back as production_tracking_baseline_recorded with record_count=1, production_quantity_count=0, labor_entry_count=0, actual_labor_hours=0.0, apparatus_progress_count=0, and progress_update_count=0.
No existing customer completion baseline seam was present before PM Lane 283.
scope: Add customer completion record store adapters for memory and Supabase-backed stores.

Add focused tests for accepted zero-output baseline write, idempotent replay, replay mismatch rejection, missing production tracking rejection, customer delivery or finance widening rejection, and role rejection.
Extend deployed mutation-seam smoke coverage for customer completion route/readback registration.
Persist one deterministic PM Lane 283 customer completion baseline record after hosted deploy.
not_allowed: No customer commitment or customer delivery event.
No labor entry or actual labor hour write.
No apparatus progress or progress update write.
No billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance output.
No source workbook or PDF writeback.
No new service, DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
No autonomous AI business-state mutation beyond the single zero-report and zero-evidence customer completion baseline explicitly admitted here.
schema_plan: Apply migration 006 to runtime DSN without printing secrets.
Verify initial runtime customer completion record count is 0.
validation_plan: Hosted readback before live write: customer completion status reports no_customer_completion_record and storage_available=true.
Hosted live POST: accepted zero-report and zero-evidence customer completion baseline.
Hosted same-payload replay: idempotent_hit with no second record.
Hosted readback after replay: customer_completion_baseline_recorded, customer report count 0, completion evidence count 0, external delivery blocked, and finance authorities not_admitted.
Hosted smokes: deployed mutation-seam smoke with PM intake, hosted PM intake smoke, hosted operations routes smoke.

schema_result.runtime_schema_ensure: hosted status route returned no_customer_completion_record, storage_available=true, record_count=0 after migration 006 availability check.
schema_result.hosted_pre_write_status: direct mutation-seam and operations-web returned no_customer_completion_record, storage_available=true, record_count=0, production_tracking_record_count=1.

local_validation_result: PASS: customer completion tests passed, production tracking tests passed, durable field record tests passed, import persistence tests passed, approval persistence tests passed, py_compile passed, packet JSON parsed, and scoped git diff check passed.

hosted_execution_result.pre_fix_post_result: Initial hosted POST attempts against the pre-fix deployment returned HTTP 500 with no partial customer completion record; status readback stayed no_customer_completion_record record_count=0.
hosted_execution_result.fix_commit: 91a7f9a6 fixed JSON-safe precondition evidence before hosted retry.
hosted_execution_result.final_status: direct mutation-seam and operations-web returned customer_completion_baseline_recorded, record_count=1, customer_report_count=0, completion_evidence_count=0, customer_delivery_authority=not_admitted_external_delivery, and finance/billing/payroll/invoice/accounting authorities not_admitted.
hosted_execution_result.hosted_validation: deployed mutation-seam smoke RESULT PASS; hosted PM intake smoke PM_INTAKE_HOSTED_SUMMARY failed=0; hosted operations routes smoke SMOKE_SUMMARY failed=0 passed=12.

next_recommended_lane: After live customer completion baseline closeout, the next blocker is financial handoff admission after customer completion proof.
